title: Daily Top 5 - Starter Set
summary: A starter Daily Top 5 using fixed-scope, beginner-readable opportunities. These are public-safe seed examples, not copied job listings.

items.reason_included: Clear buyer pain, easy deliverable, beginner-safe, strong small-business fit.
items.suggested_next_move: Offer 20 owner-approved review replies for a fixed price.

items.reason_included: Simple package that saves owners time and avoids complex tool setup.
items.suggested_next_move: Ask for repeated customer questions and draft 10 FAQ answers.

items.reason_included: Easy to understand, visual, small scope, and good for Canva beginners.
items.suggested_next_move: Clean up one existing flyer using buyer-provided facts and assets.

items.reason_included: Batchable writing cleanup with clear deliverables and low tool cost.
items.suggested_next_move: Clean up 10 listings using seller-provided product facts.

items.reason_included: Boring but useful cleanup task with real buyer pain and good starter pricing.
items.suggested_next_move: Inspect one small PDF, confirm columns, and deliver a clean spreadsheet.
